description: Climate science frontiers - sensitivity, tipping points, attribution, mitigation.

distractors: has been precisely determined to be exactly 3.0 degrees Celsius by consensus
is known to be less than 1 degree Celsius with very high confidence
cannot possibly be estimated by any known scientific methodology
completely stable conditions showing no significant measurable change
recovery and substantial growth over the past decade consistently
exactly matching all climate model predictions with high precision

facts.context: Tipping points in Earth's climate system:
facts.truth: are possible but thresholds remain uncertain
distractors: have all been definitively identified with precise threshold values
do not exist according to established climate science consensus
have already all been irreversibly crossed according to data

facts.context: Attribution science linking weather to climate change:
distractors: can prove exact causation for every single extreme weather event
has been completely abandoned as scientifically impossible always
shows absolutely no connection between climate and weather events

facts.truth: exists but scale and cost are challenges
distractors: has already completely solved climate change problem worldwide
is impossible according to fundamental thermodynamic physical laws
is now cheaper than all other existing energy sources globally

facts.context: Ocean acidification due to CO2 absorption:
facts.truth: is measurable and threatens marine life
distractors: is not actually occurring according to ocean measurement data
has absolutely no effect on any marine life whatsoever
is actually beneficial for all marine organisms universally

facts.truth: shows weakening signals but collapse uncertain
distractors: is strengthening dramatically according to all observational data
is perfectly stable with no changes observed whatsoever
has already completely collapsed disrupting European climate

facts.truth: is ongoing with uncertain total magnitude
distractors: is definitively not occurring according to Arctic field measurement campaigns
releases completely negligible carbon compared to human industrial emissions
has been completely quantified with absolutely no remaining scientific uncertainty

facts.truth: provide cooling that masks some warming
distractors: have absolutely no effect on global temperature whatsoever
cause warming that exceeds greenhouse gas effects completely
are perfectly understood with no remaining uncertainty at all

facts.truth: is small and uncertain but not exhausted
distractors: has already been completely exhausted according to all analyses
is unlimited because 1.5C target is already impossible to achieve
allows centuries more emissions at current rates comfortably

facts.truth: is largest source of uncertainty in projections
distractors: is perfectly understood and contributes no uncertainty whatsoever
is negligible compared to other climate system feedbacks
always cools the planet counteracting greenhouse warming

facts.truth: support IPCC likely range but have limitations

are completely irrelevant to future climate projections
